title: Seneca Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Approval exploit involving transferFrom calls to drain assets from users with active approvals

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls transferFrom() with active approvals to Seneca's contracts
prevention.trigger: transferFrom() -> Seneca contract in single tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls transferFrom() with active approvals to Seneca's contracts
summary: Seneca Protocol suffered a significant loss due to an approval exploit that drained assets from users with active approvals. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for calls to transferFrom() with active approvals to Seneca's contracts.
